message:
fix(freeze): use deferred detachment for closure local captures

Previously, closures captured a snapshot of local variables at fclosure
creation time (immediate detachment). This broke function hoisting where
function declarations capture classes defined after them - the class
would be undefined because it wasn't yet assigned when the closure was
created.

The fix:
1. Use shared var_refs that point to _locals_jsv for local captures
2. Sync _locals_jsv from locals at function return before detaching
3. Detach var_refs at function return, copying the final values

This ensures closures see the final values of all local variables,
matching standard JavaScript semantics.

Fixes: Zod "Invalid input throws" test (now 10/10 pass)
Tests: forEach, RxJS, class in closure all still pass
